title: Browserbase Context
description: Schema for the Browserbase Context object. A context is an encrypted, reusable browser profile (cookies, localStorage, IndexedDB, and authenticated state) that can be attached to one or more sessions.

uploadUrl.description: Signed URL used to upload the context payload directly to Browserbase storage.

publicKey.description: Public key used to envelope-encrypt the context payload.

cipherAlgorithm.description: Symmetric algorithm used to encrypt the payload (e.g. AES-256-GCM).

initializationVectorSize.description: Required IV size, in bytes, for the chosen cipher algorithm.
